tags: concentration music, focus music, sitar, morning music, study music, productivity music, deep focus, indian classical sitar, deep concentration, indian classical music, ambient music, background music, instrumental music, sitar music, music for studying, focus session, morning focus music, brain power music
description:
Concentration Music | Deep Focus with Sitar

You sat down to work twenty minutes ago. You've checked your phone four times. Refreshed Slack. Opened a tab, closed it, opened another. Your coffee's cold.

This is for that.

Twenty minutes of sitar. No layered tones, no frequency tricks. Just one instrument played slowly, made to stay out of your way while you actually do the thing.

Press play. Pick one task. Don't switch.

⏱ Chapters
0:00  Settling
7:00  Deeper
15:00  Flow
20:00  End

🎵 Pure acoustic sitar.
🚫 No ads.

If twenty minutes isn't enough — loop it.

#ConcentrationMusic #SitarMusic #DeepFocus #MorningMusic #StudyMusic
thumbnail_prompt: Pichwai/Kangra miniature painting style — ornate floral border, aged parchment background, Indian classical musician playing sitar seated cross-legged, dawn light, lotus flowers, peacocks, warm golden tones. Teal serif overlay text. 16:9 aspect ratio.

production_spec.note: Attenuate ~0.7dB to hit -14 LUFS target before export

ab_test_goal: Learn which audience pool converts better — cognitive focus seekers (concentration music) vs morning productivity seekers (morning music). Track impressions + CTR + AVD% separately for A and B.
strategic_bet: Coffee-shop energy sitar fills the concentration music pool with Indian classical — differentiates from western ambient/electronic competitors
